acceptance_criteria.description: The repository is physically organized around WorldEval, WorldArena, apps, features, operations, and media without changing frozen protocol bytes.
Legacy and new Python imports, command names, API routes, launchers, and checked-in replay verification remain compatible.
Repository agents can validate, claim, block, release, recover, and evidence-gate features using directory-authoritative state.

compatibility: Preserve frozen protocol package bytes and locks.
Keep genesis_arena imports, genesis-* commands, API routes, game IDs, replay schemas, and artifact identifiers valid.
migration: Move complete subsystem roots in one integration cutover and repair path consumers through the workspace manifest.
privacy: Do not introduce credentials or private run artifacts into tracked files.
rollback: The cutover must remain revertible as one merge without destructive resets.

in: Repository reorganization and workspace path resolution
Python package and command compatibility facades
out: Migrating the frozen WorldArena game compatibility capsule

summary: Reorganize the monorepo and install a safe, evidence-driven workflow for coding agents without breaking historical WorldArena behavior.
title: Repository governance and single-cutover reorganization
